guardEvidence.howCaught: Three new self-triggered notifiers: door-dark (episode budget = chain length + widening backoff + flapping breaker → converges to the bucket budget; eternal-sentinel rate floor while the chain stays dark), fallback-spike (one digest per hour bucket under sustained churn — bucket edge is the rate floor), cap-approach (edge latch per (kind,threshold,window) — horizon-independent; the daily re-arm is calendar-driven, not feedback-driven). All modeled + settling under the pinned fixture (47/47).
